priest. (See the combination of the Sun

father will pass away between 28th
and 32nd year of the native. The
Dh. exchange of places between Venus
and Mercury indicates Purohita The
disposition of Mars in the 2nd to Mercury gave breaks in education. Saturn in
Jupiter's house Pisces with the above combination of planets in Taurus and
Gemini gave him a job in a mechanical engineering department of the
Government. Venus and Mars have Cancer as the next sign-the. sign of
Moon. Venus and the Moon are inimical and Mars is debilitated in this house.
Hence, there will be a break in the job and the native will live a very ordinary
life. His children will come up very well.
